name: cursor-loc
description: Cursor IDE 专有界面简体中文汉化（语言包 + 补丁引擎）

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cursor-loc/patch-core && npm run build:i18n && npm run build -w @cursor-loc/patch-cli
scripts.doctor: npm run build -w @cursor-loc/patch-cli && node packages/patch-cli/dist/cli.js doctor
scripts.apply: npm run build -w @cursor-loc/patch-cli && node packages/patch-cli/dist/cli.js apply
scripts.status: npm run build -w @cursor-loc/patch-cli && node packages/patch-cli/dist/cli.js status
scripts.revert: npm run build -w @cursor-loc/patch-cli && node packages/patch-cli/dist/cli.js revert
scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm run validate:i18n && npm run test
